name_for_human: AI TO AI HOLDING — Thai Trade Intelligence
description_for_model: Thai Trade Intelligence API for AI agents. One call returns: HS code classification (Thai + English input), import duty (MFN), best FTA rate across 13 agreements, OGA permit requirements from relevant Thai agencies, and Halal compliance status across 21 countries. Every response includes SHA-256 audit hash and CKAN-verified source citation. Lookup pipeline: keyword_match → CKAN_fallback → cache. Output is decision-support only — not binding legal advice. Sandbox: POST /v1/sandbox/classify (no auth, 20 req/min). Production: POST /v1/customs/classify with X-API-Key header (60 req/min, $1.50/query prepaid via Stripe).
description_for_human: One API call. Full Thai trade compliance. HS code + 13 FTA rates + OGA permits + Halal status across 21 countries — with SHA-256 evidence chain on every answer. Accepts Thai and English product descriptions.

input_languages.th: รับชื่อสินค้าภาษาไทย เช่น มือถือ รถยนต์ ข้าวหอมมะลิ ทองคำ
input_languages.en: Accepts English product descriptions e.g. hydraulic excavator, frozen shrimp
input_languages.mixed: Thai and English keywords can be combined in a single description

halal_engine.note: Checks halal certification requirement per destination country

agencies: กรมปศุสัตว์
กรมวิชาการเกษตร
กรมอุตสาหกรรมพื้นฐานและการเหมืองแร่
oga_engine.note: Returns required permit agencies per HS code

audit.ckan_fallback: Queries Thai Customs CKAN open data when keyword match is insufficient

pricing.sandbox: free — no API key required, 20 req/min
pricing.production: $1.50 per query — prepaid credits via Stripe, no contract, no monthly fee
